gaps.description: Docker deployment (Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, setup.sh) present in install/
Hardware detection (GPU/memory/arch) for Apple Silicon / NVIDIA / CPU-only
Hardware-adaptive model selection wired through optimizer.js into llm.js loadConfig()
LLM runtime with local Ollama + cloud fallback (OpenAI/Anthropic) — llm.js fully implemented
STT/TTS adaptive runtime with hardware-based provider selection — wired to agentic-voice, all adapters present in node_modules
Memory module with vector embedding (agentic-store + embed.js)
Admin UI and client voice UI (Vue 3 + Vite)
Hot-reload config via watchProfiles — profiles.js polls every 30s with ETag-based conditional fetching
Remote profiles.json fetch — 4-tier fallback: fresh cache → remote fetch → expired cache → built-in default.json
Multi-device session coordination — joinSession/broadcastSession with brainState (context, systemPrompt, temperature) shared across devices
Wake word server-side pipeline — startWakeWordPipeline() fully implemented with node-record-lpcm16 + energy-based VAD
HTTPS via httpsServer.js + cert.js exists and functional; LAN tunnel (tunnel.js) not found in codebase
Server-side VAD — energy-based VAD in vad.js + hub.js isSilent(); no model-based (Silero) VAD
npx agentic-service — bin entry in package.json points to bin/agentic-service.js (exists, executable); src/cli/setup.js complete
External packages — agentic-store, agentic-voice, agentic-sense, agentic-embed all in package.json and installed in node_modules
Test suite — ~36 tests failing across detector/server/CLI groups; runtime tests hang; 257+ tests passing
Voice latency <2s — profiler.js measurePipeline() enforces 2000ms budget; /api/voice logs latency and warns on exceed; m94 tests pass
CPU profiling / performance instrumentation — profiler.js with startMark/endMark/getMetrics; integrated into stt.js, tts.js, llm.js; benchmark.js exists
